text:
On Tue, 22 Dec 2009 13:47:38 +0300
Yuri Pankov <yuri.pankov@gmail.com> wrote:

Yuri, you are right, forget to comment it out from my "build.7.2-FreeBSD" tinderbox env file.
I remove and rebuilt all packages and it works well now. Sorry for this report.
It would be nice to have some handling of such situation anyway

> Looks like you have WITHOUT_X11 defined in your environment, as xlib
> support is ifdef'ed WITHOUT_X11 in graphics/cairo/Makefile.
> 
> 
> Yuri
